\"Descubra como nossa plataforma pode aj: "Discover how our platform can help you manage your sales, organize your products and reach more customers efficiently."
Como posso começar a usar?: How can I start using it?
É simples! Siga estes 5 passos para come: It's simple! Follow these 5 steps to get started.
Do seu estoque até a primeira venda, sem: From your inventory to your first sale, without complicating your life
Cadastre seus produto do seu jeito e que: Register your product your way and that makes sense for you and your routine.
Encontre, registre e organize sua agenda: Find, register and organize your event schedule in one place.
Personalize seu catálogo com a sua cara: Personalize your catalog with your face and get everything ready to show your customers, even during the event.
Registre suas vendas na hora, sem ser tu: Record your sales on the spot, without being a chaos, and keep track of everything as it happens.
Veja os produtos que mais vende e o que: See the products that sell the most and what needs to be replenished quickly.
O Artistar é uma plataforma feita de art: Artistar is a platform made by artists for artists, that helps you organize the professional side of your art, from your sales to your inventory, from the events you'll participate in to the catalog your customers will see, all in one place.
Posso usar o Artistar durante eventos?: Can I use Artistar during events?
Pode sim e deve! O Artistar foi projetad: Yes, you can and you should! Artistar was designed for you to be able to record your sales on the spot, in the fastest way and without losing sales, even in the middle of the movement.
O Artistar é uma plataforma de loja virt: Is Artistar a virtual store platform?
Ele não é uma loja virtual. O Artistar c: It's not a virtual store. Artistar takes care of the organization of your business as a whole, including helping you sell better, within the events you participate in.
Funciona para quem está começando agora?: Does it work for those who are just starting now?
Óbvio! Inclusive, é uma ótima forma de v: Of course! In fact, it's a great way for you to start with everything organized from the beginning!
E se eu já vendo há um tempo?: What if I've been selling for a while?
Melhor ainda! O Artistar te ajuda a sair: Even better! Artistar helps you get out of improvisation and have more control and professionalism over what you already do ; )
